name: Passover Forgotten Torte with Raspberry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Red raspberries or one -package frozen, thawed
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400°F. In a large bowl, mix egg whites, sugar, vanilla, lemon juice, and almond extract until foamy. Gradually add raspberries or thawed frozen berries, stirring gently. Fold in mint leaves if using.
Press the mixture into a greased 9-inch square pan, creating an even layer. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until set. Let cool completely before assembling.
To assemble:
1. Spread raspberry sauce (made by blending cooled raspberries with sugar and vanilla) over the cooled torte.
2. Chill thoroughly before slicing and serving.
Makes 8 servings.
